ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, editor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user, linked to user_roles */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., branding, content) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group's purpose */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon associated with the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the approval record */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting that was approved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved it */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the approval was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Optional comment for the approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_approvals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user visiting the site */,
  "visited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visit occurred */,
  "page" TEXT /* Page that was visited */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the feedback message */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "help_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the help article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcement_settings" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the announcement */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the announcement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the announcement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the announcement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the announcement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the announcement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcement_clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement that was clicked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who clicked the announcement */,
  "clicked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the announcement was clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcement_clicks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcement_clicks_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcement_settings ("announcement_id")
)
